_comment: SDLC validation suite for ai-event-system. Mirrors the original 8-check suite (CHECK 0-8.5) now externalized to harness.json via the richer check kinds (base-template D6). The original CHECK 0c (raise ... from e) is intentionally dropped: it duplicated ruff B904 (flake8-bugbear, already in [tool.ruff.lint] select and gating via net-new-lint), but with a multi-line false-positive grep. Keep app/ build/test commands in CLAUDE.md in sync with this file. Tool commands use `python -m <tool>` so the PROJECT venv's tool runs, not a global uv-tool install (a bare `uv run pytest`/`uv run pylint` can resolve to a global tool missing this repo's deps).

checks.name: standing-rules
checks.purpose: CLAUDE.md standing-rule scan (non-waivable) — rules, not pre-existing debt

checks.name: app-import
checks.purpose: App imports cleanly; surface Pydantic field-shadow warnings (advisory)
checks.command: cd app && uv run python -c 'import main'

checks.name: worker-import
checks.purpose: Worker config imports cleanly; surface Pydantic field-shadow warnings (advisory)
checks.command: cd app && uv run python -c 'import worker.config'

checks.name: db-session-import
checks.command: cd app && uv run python -c 'import database.session'

checks.name: db-repository-import
checks.command: cd app && uv run python -c 'import database.repository'

checks.name: net-new-lint
checks.purpose: Ruff — fail only on violations this task introduced (diff vs worktree-creation baseline)
checks.baselineCommand: uv run python -m ruff check app/ --output-format=json
checks.command: uv run python -m ruff check app/ --output-format=json

checks.name: pytest-count
checks.purpose: Pytest collection count must not drop vs the previous task (catches silently-removed tests)

checks.name: pytest
checks.purpose: Full test suite — AUTHORITATIVE for verdict
